How Senior Advocates Prepare a Case Chronology Before Court | EduLaw Advocate Playbook 033

Learn how advocates can turn scattered case papers into a court-ready chronology, identify limitation risks, track admissions, organise procedural history, and prepare a five-date hearing note.
